transcript.text:
Would there be...
a gukbap* restaurant that has people waiting at 10 PM? *Korean rice soup
(Just how good is it...?)
(Excited) There's more meat inside!
(First of all, there's plenty of meat) It's packed with meat!
(This gukbap restaurant's specialty is raw beef sashimi!) I heard their raw beef sashimi is amazing here
(A 3-level exclamation)
(4-level exclamation) Wow!
You sure had a lot!
There's no way I can eat this much food
Just look at all that
(A late hungry time when people couldn't fall asleep)
Hey guys!
I'm in Daejeon today
(There are so many good places in Daejeon) I can't even count how many times I got here
I'm at a gukbap restaurant for a late-night meal

I actually arrived around 10 PM earlier
(And there was a line-up!) and saw people waiting
(It's 11 PM right now) The restaurant's still packed
Could you find a gukbap restaurant with people waiting even at 10 PM?
(Enters) Welcome
There's the menu
I heard the raw beef sashimi is really good
They say I must try it
(Not only the gukbap) I heard the naejangtang(offal soup) is also really good
(Full of popular menus) I'm craving galbitang(Beef rib soup) too! Should I get one as well?
(There is so much food I want) I'm seated at a table for 1
(while I have limited space) so I can't order that many since it's too small
Since it's already late, I'll have just a few
(All ready) Excuse me!
Thank you
I'll get one of beef gukbap, naejangtang, galbitang each

How many people are...
I'm by myself
You're eating that much food?
I eat a lot
I'll also get two orders of 150g raw beef sashimi
I'll also get 1 yukhoe* *Beef tartare
You want 2 large sashimi?
You're getting too much!
Gukbap is the best
Seeing that the place is crowded even at this hour
proves that it's an approved place
I'm so curious to try them out
(Excited)
(The 3-gukbap combo is getting ready)
I wanna eat the oil sauce at least since I'm so famished...
(Today's TMI!) I shot 2 mukbangs already today

(Through the oil sauce mukbang,)
(here's the raw beef sashimi)
(Yukhoe)
Thank you
I got it, thank you
How can you eat all that?
(More shocking after putting all of them down)
(Thumbs up) I wish you the best
(Exits as she wishes her success) I really do
Ooh, the yukhoe already looks yummy
It's yukhoe with red chili pepper paste, huh?
It isn't like any other yukhoe out there
This place is definitely a good restaurant
(A boiling gukbap is coming for you)
(It's naejangtang -> beef gukbap -> galbitang in order) Thank you
Wow, the smell...

The smell of gukbap
It already smells amazing!
(Excited) There's even more meat inside!
(Excited) It's packed with meat, seriously
Starting with soup
(That's what I'm talking about)
Yum
It's...
like what we know!
(A familiar taste since it's good) It's familiar so it has to taste good!
It's like ox bone soup and beef radish soup!
It's like a mix of them
It's perfectly seasoned
and tastes very... rich!
I found a great restaurant
(Tonight's late-night meal is also a great success)

It's perfectly seasoned
For those who want to season it more, maybe add pepper?
(That's me) Just a bit
(Just a bit)
There we go
(Gukbap X kimchi is the best collab!) Gotta top kimchi on it
So hot!
(Hot soup makes it better)
So good
Oh, from what I heard,
I heard their beef sashimi is amazing
so I must try it out
(It's the talk of the city!) Look at that texture already
Seeing how the yukhoe is good, I can tell this will also taste good
(A 3-level exclamation)
It's crazy!

There's bit of a chewy texture
but it's also very tender
It kind of melts in the mouth but chewy at the same time
It's slightly tender and...
(It's tender and melts softly in the mouth)
(No wonder it's so popular) So good! It's so tender
Wow!
Yum
Both their raw beef sashimi and yukhoe is good
They use chili pepper paste for the yukhoe and it's really good
(No need to explain the gukbap) As for the gukbap, wow...
It's something everyone will love!
I had a slice of meat with every spoon of rice
yet there's still this much left!
See that?
(It's packed with meat)

(You know dishes that taste familiar are the best) I like familiar-tasting food the best
Look at all that meat
Yukhoe
I don't like
yukhoe that are
either frozen or has a crunchy texture like the ones at a buffet
I can tell that the beef is perfect
I think it'll taste great with rice!
(One mouth, four slies) It melts in the mouth, so I could eat this much
(It melts in the mouth anyway)
Wow, the soup is amazing!
The deeper I go, the richer it gets
(Finished the beef gukbap)
Next in the line is naejangtang
(Switch the position)
Let's try the soup first

It's naejangtang!
Tastes completely different than the beef rice soup
This tastes like what I like
There's my #1 bias gukbap restaurant
The moment I had this soup,
(This vibe... feels like my kind of vibe) I felt a similar vibe!
This tastes amazing!
If I have to choose just one, I don't know what I should get...
(It's fine, you won't have to) I honestly can't pick just one!
I prepared scissors guys
I prefer slicing gukbaps
that have these leaves of veggies
so I always cut them up like this
(All ready to go) Looks good
(Put the rice in) I'll just put rice inside
(and go for that perfect bite!)

The moment you have a bite, it's spicy
and perfectly seasoned
Ooh... Yum
It really reminds me
of my #1 bias gukbap restaurant
It tastes a little bit like yukgaejang* *Spicy meat stew
I think I would have visited this place a ton if it were close to my place!
Btw, this place runs 24/7
so it's open even in early mornings
(You're just way too good, come on...)
The tripe is rather tender
instead of being chewy
Even the leaves are soft
What do others usually get?
I think they almost always get beef gukbap and beef sashimi!
Gukbap restaurant and beef sashimi?

I thought it's a weird combo, but it's honestly so good
But they have so many ingredients
Even the naejangtang is full of intestines
I'm so happy
(Again, it's another happy mukbang day)
(When you see the bottom, lift and drink the soup)
Last one
(Last one up!)
This is galbitang
The galbi...
(You can already tell it's packed with galbi)
(Touched)
This place serves such a hearty meal
Do you see all these ribs?
Look at the ingredients and the soup!
It's as big as an extra-large size in other restaurants!

Should we grab a galbi?
Oh, soup first!
I almost made a big mistake
Hmm? This one also
tastes similar to the beef gukbap
(It's a galbitang version of beef gukbap) Tastes like a mix of galbitang and beef gukbap!
Are there radishes in here too?
How does it taste like this?
Right now...
I asked to heat up the galbitang again because it went cold!
How is it so good?
(It's time to take out the rice I've been keeping!)
From how I see it, I think it'll taste great with rice
If not, then whatever
(It's seasoned so it should go well with rice too)
Yukhoe sushi!

(I knew it)
Yummy
(Finished the yukhoe too)
(The galbitang is back hot and ready) I think it's here! Thank you
(Trying the soup first right away)
Ahh, making it hot is definitely better
The soup is amazing for this too
Should I dig in the meat now?
It's so hot
I think I gotta cool it for a minute at least
(Shake it, shake it)
(It's hot but I want to eat it asap) That's hot! I'll give it a try
(Something just passed me...)
Did you see that?
See how tender it is?
I already swallowed it!

It's super tender
Whenever I eat galbitang,
(How to eat galbitang) I mince the beef
but there's plenty of meat,
so I'll cut up to this part and finish the rest as it is
I'll have just one of this
(Separated it as she wanted) No!
(You really make me happy) The meat coming out was so satisfying
You can leave the meat as it is and it'll separate itself from the bone
Let's add rice
(Slice the meat beforehand and add rice)
(because that makes it better)
Using both hands
This is how I used to eat
I think adding a bit of salt and pepper will make it even better
But just a tiny amount

(I think her definition of "tiny" is different) Just a tiny bit of pepper
Good!
Ooh!
(This is just way too good) So good
It's salty but good
Ahh, the power of sodium
I can't stop but crave it
Even the sesame oil is good
I'm sure this is just plain sesame oil...
I think it's just all in my head
(It's perfect portion as a late-night meal) I think it was a great idea to order just this much
For gukbap, the portion isn't what matters
It's how hearty it feels after you finish one rice soup
Wait, not one
(It fills me up quicker than other food) Eating two or three is really satisfying
(It fills me up quicker than other food) I guess it's from savoring the hotness?

(Level of satisfaction: 10/10)
Scrumptious
(Already?) Last slice of raw beef sashimi
It's fine!
After I finish shooting this,
(I'll be asking for a "lemme have a bite" chance later) I'll be eating more when the producer eats his meal
(What a clean finish!)
Wow!
Oh my gosh! Where did all the food go?
There's no way I can eat this much food
Look at that!
Congratulations
Thank you(?)
It was way too good! So good!
Thank you
Oh!

(I was suspicious about it... You really are Tzuyang?) I couldn't tell because you're so much skinnier than I saw you on YouTube
(Listen, this lady ate all this!) My gosh, she had two orders of large raw beef sashimi, yukhoe
and all that!
(A photo time with her fan she randomly encountered) What an honor
Thank you
It's a famous restaurant I happened to come across
and I had such a wonderful meal here
Again, thanks for a great meal!
